## Summary

## Boundary review

- [ ] No signing, direct CLOB, executor DB, or approval-granting behavior
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive values exposed in logs, reprs, errors, or fixtures
- [ ] Executor contract compatibility preserved or documented

## Validation

List exact pytest, Ruff, mypy, Bandit, and packaging results.

## Independent review

Record the external review reference for credential or authorization changes.
